---
title: "General Settings"
pageId: "69ef0c339b4ca5aaa64976b6"
---

From the **Settings menu,** select **General Settings**. General Settings is selected by **default **\(see Figure 1\).

![](data:image/png;base64,)

#### **Basic Details**

- Displays the **workspace name** \(for example, *docuwiz*\).
- This field shows your workspace identifier used across the platform.
- It is **non\-editable** to maintain consistency and avoid conflicts with connected repositories or API configurations.

#### **Theme Settings**

- Allows customization of the **workspace appearance** to align with brand or team preferences.
- Options available include:
  - **Primary Color Picker:** Modify the theme color \(for example, \#f163ea\).
  - **Upload Logo:** Add your company or project logo for light mode.
  - **Upload Logo for Dark Mode:** Add an alternate version of the logo optimized for dark backgrounds.
  - **Upload Favicon:** Set a custom favicon \(up to 50KB\).
- These visual updates instantly reflect in your workspace and public documentation portal.

#### **Permanent Setting**

- Contains irreversible workspace options for administrative control.
- The **Delete Workspace** button permanently removes the workspace and all associated data.
- This action cannot be undone, so it should be used cautiously and only by authorized users.
